stages.objective: Observe block mapping for read operations.
stages.goal: Verify fs.path and fs.blockmap events in proper progression.
stages.theory_detail: Read requests require metadata lookup to map logical offsets to physical blocks.

hints.concept: Mapping events demonstrate implementation path, not just syscall success.
hints.explicit: Run until both fs.path and fs.blockmap appear for read request.

stages.objective: Diagnose read mapping evidence and completion.
stages.goal: Pass mapping trace checks with successful run completion.

hints.nudge: Inspect mapping for each read chunk.
hints.concept: Missing mapping evidence means the implementation path is incomplete.
hints.explicit: Rerun from reset and verify full path+blockmap coverage before submit.

stages.objective: Tune environment and keep read mapping checks stable.
stages.goal: Preserve mapping and completion checks after config changes.

hints.concept: Performance tuning should not remove mapping correctness evidence.
hints.explicit: Apply one latency/config change, rerun, and verify all validators.
